content.en:
Billions of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation finally stepped into the peak realm of the sixth realm.

"Finally broke through, the peak of the sixth realm!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

However, when he went to the Purgatory Holy Sect to take over the task, it was still in the middle of the sixth realm, after all, he had been there many times, and his body had already had serious problems, and it would be normal if he could continue to easily break through to the peak of the sixth realm.

It's normal for him to show an attitude of sacrificing himself for the forces behind him.

"I have to enter the Spell Spirit Gold Vein again, this time to the place that the Extinction Realm Lord said, and see if I can take that treasure!"

Ye Tian knew that it would be difficult to take that treasure, but he had to give it a try.

......

Spell Gold Vein.

Deep.

Ye Tian came here, at this time, the special power of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein was constantly corroding his body, his body was originally a body with some problems, in order to confuse the Purgatory Holy Sect to guard the sixth realm here.

Now it seems that it is necessary to change to a replica body, and it is necessary to maintain the cultivation of the peak of the sixth realm, so that it is better to persevere.

Soon.

Ye Tian condensed another true body to copy his body, and then continued to move forward.

After a while, he came to the specific location that the Lord of the Extinction Realm had said.

It was a cavern, and in the middle of it, a large gray stone appeared.

Ye Tian looked at the gray stone and silently comprehended.

Rumble!!!!!

The perception of dimensional rules instantly came to his heart, and he urged the multi-dimensional wisdom light, and the body of the outside world was still urging the Yinxuan Atlas to analyze.

In this way, his dimensional rules have progressed too quickly, far faster than using the Dimensional Arcana Divine Wisdom to improve.

"Let's see if we can take it!"

Ye Tian grabbed this stone with one hand, and the power of his whole body exploded, and even the dimensional rules were used.

The void shattered, but it didn't move.

Seeing that he couldn't take it away, Ye Tian saw if he could smash it.

"Sword Eleven~!"

Ye Tian unleashed the supreme mastery of the Five Realms.

While!

The sword light slashed at it, leaving no trace.

Ye Tian was unwilling and continued to attack.

Finally, he gave up.

"You can't take it away, you can't chop it up, you can't even destroy a trace, what the hell is this?" Ye Tian was puzzled.

That's when it happened.

A soft voice came.

"Little one, come here......"

This voice was full of temptation, but it also made Ye Tian's vigilance skyrocket.

Unmoved, he even took a few steps back.

At this time, the voice continued, "Don't you want to take this Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone?"

Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone!

Ye Tian's heart was a little moved, and he immediately became a little bolder, and went to the deepest part of this cave.

In the deepest part, in a special dimensional void.

Ye Tian saw a woman who was sitting cross-legged on an altar made of cursed spirit gold, but she was in a very bad state, her face was extremely pale, and she still had injuries on her body.

However, Ye Tian found that the other party was not trapped and seemed to be able to leave at any time.

Moreover, the opponent's strength was extremely terrifying, and Ye Tian was trembling all over his body at the moment, as if the other party could wipe him out if he leaked a wisp of breath.

The Seventh Realm, or the invincible one of the Seventh Realms.

As for the Eighth Realm, he didn't dare to think so.

"Senpai!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He didn't dare to leave now, otherwise the other party would really kill him, and he wouldn't be able to escape.

He wasn't afraid that his duplicate body would fall, but if the other party was in the eighth realm, a single blow would not only kill him, but even directly kill his entire body across the twelfth dimension, completely annihilating him.

This is unlikely, but not impossible.

"You are very good, you have actually comprehended the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, as long as it takes time, there is also hope to comprehend the Six Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, so I will give you a chance. The woman said.

"Senior, please speak. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Go to the outside world and collect some Yuanxia treasure liquid for me, and send it here. Remember, don't talk about the situation here, or I'll kill you in an instant no matter how deep you hide. "

"By the way, I am a cultivator at the peak of the Eighth Realm, you don't have any other thoughts, even if it is the Purgatory Holy Sect, I can destroy it with a wave of my hand, and it is useless for you to inform them of the information here. "

The woman threatened.

The pinnacle of the eighth realm!

Ye Tian gasped, the highest cultivation in the upper domain was the ninth realm, but the existence of the ninth realm was extremely mysterious, he had not heard of it, nor did he know about it, but it was absolutely extremely rare and rare.

Therefore, the peak of the eighth realm is already an unimaginable existence.

"'Senior, what is Yuanxia Treasure Liquid?'

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it, so he asked.

"I almost forgot, you are only the peak cultivation of the sixth realm, and it is normal that you have not heard of the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid, I told you that there are three places where the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid exists. "

The woman said three places, and Ye Tian remembered them.

Ye Tian asked again: "Senior, how do you take that Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone?"

The woman smiled and said: "There are a total of six Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stones, which are fixed here by me with a special formation, absorbing the power of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, and they cannot be taken away for the time being, if I leave here one day, you can take them." "

Get.

Ye Tian knew that he had no way to take away the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, and he was suddenly extremely disappointed in his heart.

But at this time, the woman reminded: "You can continue to cultivate here, as long as you take the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid, you can continue to stay here, and naturally you can practice here for a long time." "

Can Yuanxia Treasure Liquid resist the influence of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein?

At this time, he finally understood why this woman wanted Yuanxia Treasure Liquid, even though she was a peak powerhouse in the Eighth Realm, she was still affected by the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

Therefore, she needs Yuanxia Treasure Liquid.

As for why the other party didn't leave, Ye Tian also had guesses, such as offending a certain Ninth Realm Three.

Could it be that the Ninth Realm can't find her here?

"Senior, there should have been a Sixth Realm here before, why don't you look for him?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Hehe, a group of Sixth Realm with no potential, they don't even have any hope of finding the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid for me. When I seek them, am I not exposing myself? You are different, your potential is very good, I hope to find me Yuanxia Treasure Liquid. As for the body that was affected by the spell spirit gold, it could also be repaired with Yuanxia Treasure Liquid. However, don't go to get the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid first, improve your strength as much as possible, and wait until your strength is enough before you go to get the Yuanxia Treasure Liquid!" the woman reminded.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.
